sections.title: Day Pass
sections.description: One-day access to our coworking space. Includes high-speed WiFi, community events, and ergonomic seating.

sections.title: Punch Pass
sections.description: 5-day pack for flexible workers who visit occasionally. Use across any location during business hours.

sections.title: Flex Desk
sections.description: Unlimited access to open seating with priority seating options, mail handling, and member perks.

sections.title: Private Office
sections.description: Move-in ready private offices with ergonomic furniture. Ideal for 1–6 people, customizable layouts available.

sections.title: Team Suite
sections.description: Larger dedicated suites for growing teams — fully furnished with dedicated meeting rooms and support services.

sections.title: Virtual Office
sections.description: Professional business address and mail handling to give your business a presence without a physical office.
